datasetId.title: Apify Dataset ID
datasetId.description: ID of the source Apify Dataset

keboolaStack.title: Keboola stack name
keboolaStack.description: Hostname of the destination Keboola stack

keboolaStorageApiKey.title: Keboola API Key
keboolaStorageApiKey.description: API Key to Keboola project where you want to upload the data

bucket.title: Keboola bucket name
bucket.description: Name of the destination Keboola bucket

table.title: Keboola table name
table.description: Name of the destination Keboola table

headers.title: Keboola table headers
headers.description: Comma separated headers of destination Keboola table. You can leave it blank if your Dataset items have always all properties specified.

batchSize.title: Batch size
batchSize.description: Size of the batch to upload. Dataset will be split into batches if it has more items.

incremental.title: Incremental load
incremental.description: If disabled, the target Keboola table is truncated before each import.
